title: meibomia strobilacea
intro: Meibomia strobilacea, also known as Butterfly Weed or Butterfly Milkweed, is a perennial plant species native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized for various health purposes. The health benefits of Meibomia strobilacea include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil to create a topical remedy.
